description: < b> Style Note< /b> We like the ability of spice art to get traditional art forms to complement modern elements to offer an ethnic yet contemporary product that you will want to show off. Beautifully done and designed by skilled craftsmen, these clutches will definitely win you a few compliments. Carry them in style with your ethnic outfit to a family function and impress.  < b> Product Details< /b> Black clutch, has beaded detail all over, embroidered, beaded and sequinned design detail in front on the sides, one main compartment with magnetic button closures and an internal zippered pocket < b> Material and Care< /b> Fabric Wipe with a clean cloth to remove dust < b> Size< /b> Dimensions: 29 cm X 10 cm Style NoteWe like the ability of Spice Art to get traditional art forms to complement modern elements to offer an ethnic yet contemporary product that you will want to show off.
